questions.question: What types of pets can I use?
questions.answer: Dogs, cats, bunnies, birds, and even hamsters! Our AI works with virtually any pet. The key is having a clear photo of your pet's face.

questions.question: What photo quality do I need?
questions.answer: No pro photos needed! Just good lighting and a clear face. Phone photos work perfectly. Avoid blurry images or photos where your pet is too far away.

questions.question: How long does it take?
questions.answer: About 30-60 seconds! Our AI is incredibly fast. You'll have your stunning portrait ready to download almost instantly.

questions.question: Can I get a refund if I don't like it?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer a 'Love it or Free Redo' guarantee. Not satisfied? We'll regenerate it for free. Still not happy? We'll refund you 100%. No questions asked.

questions.question: What do I get?
questions.answer: High-resolution 4K images suitable for printing! Perfect for framing, canvas prints, or any merchandise. Your pet will look amazing at any size.

questions.question: Is my data safe?
questions.answer: Absolutely. We take privacy seriously. We delete user photos after 30 days and never share your data with third parties. Your pet's photos are safe with us.

questions.question: Can I print this on a t-shirt or mug?
questions.answer: Absolutely! The 4K resolution is perfect for printing on anything—t-shirts, mugs, pillows, phone cases, canvas prints, you name it.

questions.question: Do you support multiple pets in one photo?
questions.answer: Currently, we're focusing on solo portraits for best quality. This ensures each pet gets the detailed, personalized treatment they deserve. Want multiple pets? Just upload them separately!

questions.question: What styles are available?
questions.answer: Choose from 3D Pixar-style, Royal Oil Painting, Watercolor Art, Pop Art, and more! Each style is carefully crafted to bring out your pet's unique personality.

questions.question: How do I download my portrait?
questions.answer: After your portrait is generated, you'll see a 'Download' button. Click it to save your high-res 4K image to your device. You'll also receive an email with the download link.
